arts.ttl: Real Madrid chase ANOTHER Liverpool star after Trent Alexander-Arnold confirmation
arts.sum: Real Madrid are interested in signing Liverpool midfielder Ryan Gravenberch, Fichajes states. It is even claimed that Liverpool could pay an additional surcharge to Real Madrid to sign the France international, even if Gravenberch, who has an Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) of €46.2m, travels in the opposite direction.
